title: Command Cockpit Mobile Launch Frame
summary: Trimmed the mobile Command Cockpit chrome into a first-screen launch frame with a smaller brand row, hidden snapshot pill, thinner deck rail, compact path strip, and mission stage visible in the first phone viewport.
proof: Added a scoped mobile launch-frame marker and CSS rules for Command Cockpit only.
Hid redundant mobile snapshot and lane-panel header chrome while preserving a compact horizontal path selector.
Verified the live 390x760 cockpit: path strip y=102, HUD y=156, mission stage y=334, stage bottom=748, and no horizontal document overflow.
